info.title: Taskade API
info.description: The Taskade API provides programmatic access to workspaces, projects, tasks, AI agents, and media in Taskade. It supports CRUD operations on tasks, project management, agent configuration, and knowledge base management.

get.description: Retrieve all workspaces accessible to the authenticated user.

200.description: Successful response with list of workspaces

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing access token

get.description: Retrieve all folders within a specified workspace.

200.description: Successful response with list of folders

post.summary: Create a project in a workspace
post.description: Create a new project directly within a workspace.

get.description: Retrieve all projects within a specified folder.

200.description: Successful response with list of projects

get.description: Retrieve all AI agents within a specified folder.

200.description: Successful response with list of agents

post.summary: Create an agent in a folder
post.description: Create a new AI agent within a specified folder.

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific project.

post.description: Restore a previously completed project back to active status.
Create a copy of a project into a specified folder.

folderId.description: Target folder ID for the copy

get.description: Retrieve all team members assigned to a project.

200.description: Successful response with list of members

get.description: Retrieve the sharing link for a project.

put.description: Enable or update the sharing settings for a project.

get.summary: List all tasks in a project
get.description: Retrieve all tasks within a specific project.

200.description: Successful response with list of tasks

post.description: Create one or more tasks in a project.

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific task.

put.description: Modify a task's content or properties.

delete.description: Remove a task from a project.

post.description: Mark a specific task as completed.
Mark a completed task as incomplete.

get.description: Retrieve the list of assignees for a task.

put.description: Set or modify the assignees for a task.

get.description: Retrieve the due date for a task.

put.summary: Set or update task due date
put.description: Set or update the due date for a task.

delete.description: Remove the due date from a task.

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific AI agent.
Retrieve all conversations for a specific AI agent.
Retrieve all projects belonging to the authenticated user.
Retrieve details for a specific media file.

delete.description: Delete a media file from the account.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token for API authentication. Obtain from Taskade account settings.
